title: Risers Texture Pack
description: A simple SMP based texture pack for Risers.
body:
# IMPORTANT
## If you are using fabric then you would need the dependency to get the cutom textures [ renaming textures]
## 🌌 Risers Custom Resource Pack
### 🪽 Cutom Elytras
1. Constellation
1. Wings of the Drangle Bear
1. Feder
1. Garnet
1. Hare’s Northern Flight
1. Mech
1. Potato Toppers
1. Starwings
1. Trees
1. You Are Valid
### 🛡️ Armor
> - >  Renaming Options:
> - > - Any armor piece can be renamed as Heavy or Light.
> - > - Can be added before the item name (Heavy Diamond Chestplate) or replace the whole name (Light Chestplate).
> - > Helmet Option:
> - > Any helmet can be renamed to Crown.
### ⚔️ Custom Weapons
- Senpai Spider’s 1M Pack (Credits: Senpai Spider) : includes all custom swords and items from the 1M Pack.
- Original Additions (by Risers)
- Amethyst GreatBlade
- Azure Scythe
- Blood Axe
- Knight Axe
### 🎶 Animated & Music Items
- Animated Items included.
> - Custom Music Discs (credits go to original song owners). Supported discs:
> - 5
> - 13
> - Blocks
> - Cat
> - Chirp
> - Far
> - Mall
> - Mellohi
> - Otherside
> - Pigstep
> - Stal
> - Ward
✨ Pack Notes:
Elytras are fully retextured with unique designs.
Armor naming system allows more roleplay & customization.
Weapons combine community favorites with original creations.
Custom discs bring a fresh soundtrack into your world.
> 
### ⚡Credits:
1. Senpai Spider – Custom swords & items (1M Pack)
1. WeNAN Studios – Menu icons
1. Song Owners – Custom disc music
